description: Work order WO-9102 reports Chiller CH-02 tripped on high head pressure. Trace backward through sensor readings, anomalies, and upstream equipment to find the root cause.
Three AHUs in Building-B reported low supply air temperature within 2 hours. Trace the event chain to determine if the root cause is a shared chilled water supply issue.
Anomaly ANM-455 on Sensor S-078 (vibration) triggered work order WO-9200. Walk back the DETECTED_ANOMALY and TRIGGERED edges to reconstruct the full event timeline.
Boiler BLR-03 experienced a flame-out. Traverse the DEPENDS_ON graph upstream to check if fuel supply, combustion air fan, or ignition system had prior anomalies.
Over the past month, 4 work orders have been created for Motor MTR-11 for the same failure mode. Is this a recurring issue? What was the root cause in each case and are repairs addressing it?
